debug_info.goal:
V : Type u
inst✝ : DecidableEq V
G : SimpleGraph V
u v : V
p : @SimpleGraph.LoopWalk V G u v
⊢ Finset.card (@SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.supportSet V G u v inst✝ p) ≤
    Finset.card (@SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.edgeSet V G u v inst✝ p) + 1

failed_attempts:
induction p with
  | nil =>
    simp [supportSet, edgeSet, support, darts, edges]
  | @cons u v w h p ih =>
    simp only [supportSet, edgeSet, support, darts, edges, List.map_cons, List.toFinset_cons]
    by_cases hu : u ∈ p.supportSet
    · rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem hu]
      trans p.edgeSet.card + 1
      · exact ih
      · apply Nat.add_le_add_right; apply Finset.card_le_card_insert
    · have he : Sym2.mk (u, v) ∉ p.edgeSet := by
        intro h
        apply hu
        apply mem_supportSet_of_mem_edgeSet
        use Sym2.mk (u, v)
        simp [h]
      rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem hu, Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem he]
      exact Nat.add_le_add_right ih 1
  | @loop u v p ih =>
    simp only [supportSet, edgeSet, support, darts, edges, List.map_cons, List.toFinset_cons]
    rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem (mem_supportSet_start p)]
    trans p.edgeSet.card + 1
    · exact ih
    · apply Nat.add_le_add_right; apply Finset.card_le_card_insert

end LoopWalkCounting
